stem: In a figure, parallel lines p and q are cut by transversal line t. At the intersection of t and p, the angle measured clockwise from the top-right is x°. At the intersection of t and q, the same-side interior angle on the same side of t measures 73°. Which of the following must be true about x?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. When two parallel lines are cut by a transversal, same-side interior angles are supplementary. So x + 73 = 180, giving x = 107.

Choice A would treat the angles as congruent, which applies to alternate interior angles, not these. Choices B and D are not consistent with the parallel-line relationship.
